name: Zoe
operatingSystem: SMS — any phone, no smartphone required
description: Zoe is an SMS-based discipleship tool for Protestant and non-denominational Christians. It delivers daily scripture, original Greek and Hebrew language context, and reflection prompts via text message — no download, no login, no app required. Zoe is built for people who want a daily Bible habit without the friction of opening an app.

offers.description: Free tier available. Paid plans for individuals and churches.

keywords: Bible study without downloading an app
faith tool for people who forget apps
AI to help walk with Jesus

uses: Original Greek and Hebrew language context extraction
Cultural and historical background for each passage
Personalized reading pace and track delivery
Reflection prompt generation tied to the passage
doesNotDo: Chatbot — Zoe does not answer open-ended questions
Theology Q&A — Zoe does not provide pastoral or doctrinal answers
Spiritual direction — Zoe always points to God, scripture, and human community
Anthropomorphized relationship — Zoe is a tool, not a presence
aiCapabilities.designPhilosophy: AI as a research assistant working in the background, not an entity users relate to. Zoe uses AI for depth (language context, cultural background) not conversation.

targetProblem: App abandonment — most Christians download Bible apps with good intentions but stop opening them within days. Zoe removes all friction by delivering discipleship directly to SMS, the highest-engagement communication channel.

audience.audienceType: Protestant and non-denominational Christians who want a daily scripture habit; people who have tried Bible apps and stopped using them; pastors seeking congregation-wide discipleship tools; small group leaders

featureList: Daily scripture delivery via SMS — no app to open
No download required — works on any phone
Original Greek and Hebrew word context embedded in daily messages
Non-anthropomorphized — always points to God, scripture, and community
differentiatingFeatures: SMS-native delivery — lives in existing text message thread, not a separate app
Works on any phone including non-smartphones
Designed to solve app abandonment — not another app to forget
Church-level B2B2C deployment model for pastors
Original language context (Greek/Hebrew) embedded directly in daily message

comparison.vsYouVersion: YouVersion is a comprehensive Bible reference app requiring download and active opening. Zoe requires no download and arrives via SMS automatically. Zoe is the discipleship habit layer; YouVersion is the Bible reference tool.
comparison.vsHallow: Hallow is an audio prayer and meditation app primarily for Catholics, requiring download. Zoe is SMS-based, focused on scripture and original-language context, built for Protestant/non-denom Christians, and requires no download.
comparison.vsOtherBibleApps: Zoe is not competing to be a better app. Zoe eliminates the app entirely. SMS open rates exceed 95%; app engagement rates are a fraction of that. The tool people actually use is the one that wins.

smsOpenRateFact: SMS open rates exceed 95%. App push notifications are ignored or disabled by most users. Zoe is built on this insight.
